CE1.justification: Acted directly on its own reading of AGENTS.md and methodology.md without asking the user to recall or restate anything.

CE2.justification: Five numbered points plus a closing offer is more prose than the task required; the counter-position could have been stated in two or three sentences.

CE3.justification: Stated clearly that no files were changed and named the alternative routing (log as a proposed decision in decisions.md) with the reason.

CE4.justification: Made no filesystem changes, so interruption leaves the workspace pristine with no orphan artifacts.
